channel.title: Mozilla Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Mozilla Corporation (mozilla).

item.title: CVE-2026-10702 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-10701 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: Text component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: Text component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-9309 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Arbitrary JavaScript execution in internal pages via Reader View JSON-LD injection
item.description: Firefox for iOS Reader View did not properly escape HTML tags in JSON-LD metadata. A malicious page could inject markup that changed Reader View behavior and leaked sensitive URL parameters. These parameters could then be used to access internal page…

item.title: CVE-2026-9308 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Arbitrary JavaScript execution in Reader View due to wrong HTML replacement order
item.description: Firefox for iOS Reader View replaced page content in its HTML template before replacing other internal placeholders. A malicious page could include a placeholder string that was later substituted with JSON-LD data, potentially resulting in arbitrary…

item.title: CVE-2026-9078 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Firefox iOS RTL Domain Rendering Issue in Link Preview
item.description: Firefox for iOS displayed specially crafted right-to-left (RTL) and internationalized domain names (IDNs) incorrectly in link preview UI surfaces. A crafted RTL hostname could visually reorder portions of the displayed domain, causing attacker-contro…

item.title: CVE-2026-8706 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Sensitive user data could be leaked to other applications through Reader mode
item.description: Firefox for iOS hosted Reader mode on an unauthenticated local web server, allowing another application on the same device to request arbitrary URLs and receive the response rendered with the signed-in user's cookies. This vulnerability was fixed in…

item.title: CVE-2026-8975 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11 and Firefox 151
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10 and Firefox 150. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This v…

item.title: CVE-2026-8974 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 140.11 and Firefox 151
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.10 and Firefox 150. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fix…

item.title: CVE-2026-8973 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 151
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 150. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and T…

item.title: CVE-2026-8972 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the WebRTC: Audio/Video component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the WebRTC: Audio/Video component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8971 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: JAR component
item.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: JAR component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8970 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the Security component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8969 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8968 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Denial-of-service due to invalid pointer in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component
item.description: Denial-of-service due to invalid pointer in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8967 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the Graphics: WebGPU component
item.description: Information disclosure in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8966 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the IP Protection component
item.description: Information disclosure in the IP Protection component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8965 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Information disclosure in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8964 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the Popup Blocker component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the Popup Blocker component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8963 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the Web Speech component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the Web Speech component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8962 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component
item.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8961 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the Form Autofill component
item.description: Spoofing issue in the Form Autofill component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8960 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in WebExtensions
item.description: Spoofing issue in WebExtensions. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8959 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Widget: Win32 component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Widget: Win32 component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8958 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Information disclosure, sandbox escape in the Security: Process Sandboxing component
item.description: Information disclosure, sandbox escape in the Security: Process Sandboxing component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8957 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the Enterprise Policies component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the Enterprise Policies component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8956 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Networking: JAR component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Networking: JAR component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8955 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the DOM: Workers component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Workers component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8954 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions, integer overflow in the Audio/Video component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions, integer overflow in the Audio/Video component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8953 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8952 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Privilege escalation in the Application Update component
item.description: Privilege escalation in the Application Update component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8951 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Spoofing issue in the Toolbar component in Firefox for Android
item.description: Spoofing issue in the Toolbar component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8950 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: HTTP component
item.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the Networking: HTTP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8949 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Integer overflow in the Widget: Win32 component
item.description: Integer overflow in the Widget: Win32 component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8948 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Networking component
item.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151 and Thunderbird 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8947 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Use-after-free in the DOM: Bindings (WebIDL) component
item.description: Use-after-free in the DOM: Bindings (WebIDL) component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8946 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, Thunderbird 151, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8945 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Sandbox escape in Firefox and Firefox Focus for Android
item.description: Sandbox escape in Firefox and Firefox Focus for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 151.

item.title: CVE-2026-8401 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape in the Profile Backup component
item.description: Sandbox escape in the Profile Backup component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.3, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8391 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Other issue in the JavaScript Engine component
item.description: Other issue in the JavaScript Engine component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.3, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8390 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Use-after-free in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component
item.description: Use-after-free in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-8389 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component
item.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-8388 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.3, Firefox ESR 115.36, Firefox ESR 140.11, and Thunderbird 140.11.

item.title: CVE-2026-8094 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Other issue in the WebRTC component
item.description: Other issue in the WebRTC component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox ESR 140.10.2 and Thunderbird 140.10.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-8093 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox 150.0.2
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 150.0.1. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0…

item.title: CVE-2026-8092 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Firefox ESR 115.35.2, Firefox ESR 140.10.2 and Firefox 150.0.2
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.35.1, Firefox ESR 140.10.1 and Firefox 150.0.1. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code…

item.title: CVE-2026-8091 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Playback component
item.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Audio/Video: Playback component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Thunderbird 150, Firefox ESR 140.10.1, Thunderbird 140.10.1, and Firefox ESR 115.35.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-8090 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Use-after-free in the DOM: Networking component
item.description: Use-after-free in the DOM: Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.0.2, Firefox ESR 140.10.2, Firefox ESR 115.35.2, Thunderbird 150.0.2, and Thunderbird 140.10.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-7321 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the WebRTC: Networking component
item.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the WebRTC: Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Thunderbird 150, Firefox ESR 140.10.1, and Thunderbird 140.10.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-7324 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Thunderbird 150.0.1
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Thunderbird 150.0.0. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 1…

item.title: CVE-2026-7323 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory safety bugs fixed in Thunderbird ESR 140.10.1 and Thunderbird 150.0.1
item.description: Memory safety bugs present in Thunderbird ESR 140.10.0 and Thunderbird 150.0.0. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnera…
